info.name: Hookdeck Bulk Operations API
info.description:
Plan, schedule, and cancel bulk operations that retry or cancel many events, requests, or ignored events at once. Returns progress and per-batch counts.

Contact Support:
 Name: Hookdeck Support
 Email: info@hookdeck.com

request.description: This endpoint estimates the number of events matched by the provided query before creating a bulk cancel.
